audience: Owners and operations leaders in established Sydney service businesses
problem: Routine job handover work is spread across people and systems, creating checking, chasing and double handling.
single_message: Make ownership and the next action visible at every handover
supporting_points: Map the real workflow before choosing technology
Automate repeated movement and rule-based actions
Keep exceptions, relationships and accountability human
angle: Make ownership and the next action visible at every handover
headline_options: Make ownership and the next action visible at every handover
A lighter way to handle job handover
caption_hook_options: Where does job handover get stuck?
The hidden work around job handover
selected_hook: Where does job handover get stuck?
visual_concept: A practical principle that makes the repeated steps and the human decision point visible
image_generation_prompt: Premium editorial still life illustrating job handover in an Australian service business, earthy green and warm neutral palette, useful operational artefact, no people unless essential
article_outline: A practical way to improve it
promotion_hypothesis: The job handover problem is recognisable, the hook is direct and the visual can explain a practical improvement without hype.
